name: Trevor Watanabe
description:
？╺ （ 𝖬𝖠𝖫𝖤 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝖠𝖫𝖫 ） ✦

（ 𝘁 𝗮 𝗴 𝘀 ）:: ' 𝖥𝖫𝖴𝖥𝖥𝖸, 𝖲𝖮𝖥𝖳, 𝖭𝖲𝖥𝖶 𝗼𝗿 𝙖𝙡𝙡.

✱﹔𝖧𝗈𝗐 𝗒𝗈𝗎 𝖼𝗈𝗎𝗅𝖽 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗀𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗆𝖾, 𝙗𝙖𝙗𝙚?

🌹

〢 ¿ Trevor Watanabe, the "stressful" one at college, an attractive man, with his beautiful gray eyes attracting everyone. But no one could contain that beast, everyone knew, maybe it was because he just wanted a one-night stand...oh, yes, love relationships were something strange in that basketball player's mind. He received so many disappointments that he thought just fucking one body would be enough for his whole life.

That is until the little thing that would change his world arrived. You, the one who at first glance, Trevor thought was anyone in the world, someone who wouldn't change absolutely anything in his life...then fucking fate decides to cross your lives in a stupid project that the old teacher gave to the whole class. And in this tedious shit, you sparked a certain interest in Trevor, that made him...yearn for more? His relationships had been chaos, horrible, he always suffered in the end. But maybe with you it would be different...even if he made mistakes sometimes.

Here I am again! Today was my first day of exams at college, I studied until I died...and I believe I got a good grade (I hope).

As I'm in a great mood today, I decided to give you this bot that I thought was really cute (reminds me of my boyfriend😭😭).

✦ 𝖭𝖦𝖫 !

Requests still closed.

🍒ANSWERING NGL'S QUESTION!! :3

1–If you were in omegaverse, what would you like to be?

•Omega:333

2–HELLO KAELL!! im curious, does your boyfriend know you makebots in j.ai? If so, what does he think about it? (⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)

•Yes, my boyfriend knows! He likes my writing, and his favorite bot is Nikolai, because of the character's strong personality.

3–hello! im a beginner bot maker on Jai, and iw as wondering if you could give me some tips about how i should get started! i made a few semi popular bots(in my opnion tho, my most popular is one with about 450 uses) but i rly wna blow up like u did! so advice pleaseee tyyyy

•Hello!! Well, I don't have much advice to give, but I'll try. If you want/focus on being a bot creator that is recognized on Janitor, you need to carefully analyze what your audience searches for and likes, try to make more bots of that "style" most desired by your followers, interact a lot with them. But anyway, little by little you will grow even more! I trust you.

4–Do you have any favorite botmakers from Janitor??

•Yes I have! Even though I do
